title: Lively
description: A resource pack that brings Minecraft to life by animating items and blocks in the game.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95f45ed3d786ffb36007c7c3c3030994fcf60b58.png)
# Animated Textures
Some of the items in the game that did not feel as alive as they should have have now been animated. For example water drips off of overflowing buckets, totems of undying blink, wisps orbit around wind charges, and more.

Blocks also got animated textures too, with some ores recieving a shine to enhance the visuals and help you spot them more easily when you are mining.

All of this was done while still maintaining the vanilla aesthetic.
